Klein2010 gives bias expansions and KennedyLorchSmall2019 gives monotone LIV inference, not open-neighborhood sharp-set separation or a breakdown radius

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add Yap2022 and Noack-style binary defier-share sensitivity explicitly to the Conjecture 1 comparison, to make clear that the continuous derivative envelope and global path compatibility are the real gap.
Spell out the full-P endpoint variables behind Conjecture 1, separating derivative mean constraints from conditional outcome-law matching so the sharp projection is less implicit.
Before Stage 1, build a concrete two-region nondegenerate witness for Conjecture 2 with numeric p', m', and b0, and solve the small linear-fractional endpoint problem to pin the separation mechanism.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjectures 1 and 2 as the open novelty kernels; keep Theorems 1 and 2 as sanity/algebraic support.
